connectorUiConfig.title: PRODAFT USTA - Account Takeover Prevention (via Codeless Connector Framework)
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown: The PRODAFT USTA Account Takeover Prevention data connector ingests compromised-credential tickets from the PRODAFT USTA platform into Microsoft Sentinel. Sensitive values are redacted at ingestion: plaintext passwords are never stored — only password strength signals (score and length) are retained for triage.

sampleQueries.query:
PRODAFTUstaCompromisedCredentials
| where IsCorporate == true
| sort by Created desc

PRODAFTUstaCompromisedCredentials
| where isnotempty(VictimMalware)
| summarize Count = count() by VictimMalware
| sort by Count desc

dataTypes.name: PRODAFTUstaCompromisedCredentials_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
PRODAFTUstaCompromisedCredentials_CL
| summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
| where isnotempty(Time)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: Read and Write permissions are required.

customs.name: PRODAFT USTA API key
customs.description: A long-lived PRODAFT USTA API key with access to the Account Takeover Prevention endpoint is required.

instructionSteps.title: Connect PRODAFT USTA Account Takeover Prevention to Microsoft Sentinel
instructionSteps.description: Enter your USTA base URL and a long-lived API key, then select Connect. The connector authenticates to USTA with the `Authorization: Bearer <api-key>` header and polls every minute. To load history from before the connection time, deploy the **PRODAFTUstaATP-Backfill** playbook shipped with this solution.
